label: Constraint propagation, logic & program execution

node.label: Constraint propagation, logic & program execution
node.definition: Explicit rules, solvers, interpreters, and executable programs enforce structure or perform exact computation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Constraint propagation, logic & program execution is to connect Discrete mathematics & logic, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations to downstream capabilities including Expert systems, production rules & rule engines, Neuro-symbolic models, Probabilistic & differentiable programming.
examples: substrate for Expert systems, production rules & rule engines
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.

dependencies.rationale: Constraint propagation, logic & program execution uses Discrete mathematics & logic as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Constraint propagation, logic & program execution uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Constraint propagation, logic & program execution uses Algorithms & data structures as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
